description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Lint that runs on workflow dispatch, push to master branch excluding tags starting with v, and pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: generic and rust. The generic job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, and executes two lint scripts. The rust job runs on ubuntu-latest with a defi/ain-builder:latest container, checks out the repository, and performs Rust format and Clippy checks.
